author: gb9t
content: Iteration 2: eswitch.md committed (d89e83e, 228 lines). Covers mlx5 eSwitch — the tenant-isolation boundary on every SR-IOV deployment. Phantom-typed mode (Eswitch<Legacy> vs Eswitch<Offloads>), phase-typed Vport, structural bug-class closure via consuming switch_to_offloads. Grsec section emphasizes structural tenant isolation: match_metadata HW-enforced source-vport tagging, ACL install-before-enable, TC-action FW-cap allowlist (closes silent-no-op exfil), indir-table depth cap, SF LATENT_ENTROPY. References historical CVE-2023-25775. Next iteration target: drivers/net/ethernet/mellanox/mlx5/core/sf/ (Sub-Functions — vport-without-PCI-BDF, modern alternative to VFs for k8s pod-per-NIC scale).
